description: Three distinct cover slide interpretations generated before editor entry. User selects one; selection propagates creative angle into all 14 body slides.

generation_config.failure_handling: per_variant_retry — do not block other variants on single failure

the_specimen.angle_description: Technical authority through the object itself — the most precise thing in the domain
the_specimen.object_selection_rule: most_technically_precise — select the instrument or mechanism object from the matched domain, not the metaphorical or abstract object
the_specimen.headline_example: Passkeys. The end of the stolen credential.

the_contrast.angle_description: Before/after contrast as the argument — the old object and the new, side by side
the_contrast.object_selection_rule: paired_objects — one from legacy/failure domain in degraded state, one from solution domain in pristine state

the_consequence.angle_description: Scale and reach — the argument is inevitability, not mechanism
the_consequence.object_selection_rule: outcome_object — select the object that represents the result or deployment at scale, not the technical mechanism
the_consequence.headline_example: Every checkout. Every device. Every market.

the_arrival.angle_description: The product as a new beginning — the freshness of what changes from this point
the_arrival.object_selection_rule: primary_product — the hero product in its most visually present state

the_detail.angle_description: The mechanism revealed — precision earns trust before the claim is made
the_detail.object_selection_rule: most_technically_detailed — circuit traces, connector pins, sensor surface — internal detail visible
the_detail.headline_example: One sensor. No passwords. No OTPs.

the_scale.angle_description: The product is everywhere — the argument is reach, not mechanism
the_scale.object_selection_rule: deployment_object — the product as it exists in use context, not pristine studio state
the_scale.headline_example: In every checkout. On every phone.

the_friction_moment.angle_description: Recognition first — the reader has been here. This carousel starts with their experience.
the_friction_moment.headline_structure: [The moment named as the reader knows it.]
the_friction_moment.headline_example: The checkout that almost didn't go through.

the_relief_moment.angle_description: Aspiration first — this is what it could be. The carousel starts from the desired future.
the_relief_moment.headline_example: Faster than you expected it to be.

the_merchant_side.angle_description: The same story, told from the other side — B2B empathy through the operator's experience
the_merchant_side.headline_structure: [The same story, from the other side.]
the_merchant_side.headline_example: What it looks like when settlement clears early.

the_metaphor.angle_description: The lateral read — the visual metaphor surprises, the headline completes it
the_metaphor.illustration_rule: avoid_the_obvious — the metaphor must require one beat of thought, not zero
the_metaphor.headline_example: The Invisible Cost of the Familiar OTP.

the_figure.angle_description: The human face of the argument — emotional authority through the lived experience of the claim
the_figure.illustration_rule: human_presence_required — figure, face, or hand as compositional center
the_figure.headline_example: What We Don't Understand About Password Fatigue.

the_scene.angle_description: The uncomfortable image — something slightly difficult to look at directly, which earns the argument's credibility
the_scene.illustration_rule: staged_dramatic — one object or scenario with strong material reality and chiaroscuro lighting
the_scene.headline_example: Is Your Checkout Secure? Probably Not in the Way You Think.

the_commerce_hall.angle_description: Activity as the proof of scale — the busiest scene, the most populated environment
the_commerce_hall.scene_preference: most_populated — counting house or quayside, seven or more figures

the_institution.angle_description: The founding moment as proof of permanence — the charter, the table, the document signed
the_institution.scene_preference: charter_signing — document prominent, eight or more figures
the_institution.headline_example: Built to endure. As the great clearing houses were.

the_navigation.angle_description: The discovery register — Juspay as the navigator charting new payment corridors
the_navigation.headline_example: The routes are being drawn now.

the_literal_hero.angle_description: The myth as it is most commonly known — direct, elevated, no translation required
the_literal_hero.scene_rule: defining_moment — the action that makes this hero who they are, in historically accurate costume and setting
the_literal_hero.headline_example: The fire stolen from Olympus. The payment freed from friction.

the_unexpected_vessel.angle_description: The animal reading — the archetype truer than the figure, rewards a second look

animal_selection_rules.fox: cunning, subversive, finding-the-way-through — outlaw archetypes, Robin Hood
animal_selection_rules.eagle: sovereign power, aerial perspective, command — hero archetypes
animal_selection_rules.owl: accumulated wisdom, institutional knowledge, long memory — sage archetypes
animal_selection_rules.wolf: pack leadership, territory, collective strength — navigator and military archetypes
animal_selection_rules.raven: intelligence, observation, messenger — Odin archetypes, information/data companies
animal_selection_rules.bear: defensive power, resource-holding, endurance — treasury and institutional archetypes
animal_selection_rules.hound: loyal service, tracking, precision — identity and security archetypes

the_unexpected_vessel.scene_rule: defining_moment_with_animal — same action as the literal hero, but depicted through the animal archetype fully anthropomorphized
the_unexpected_vessel.headline_structure: The [animal archetype noun]. [What it always does in the myth.]
the_unexpected_vessel.headline_example: The fox always finds a way through.

the_consequence.angle_description: The myth's beneficiaries, not its protagonist — the brand is the gift, not the giver
the_consequence.figure_type: beneficiary_figures — the people receiving the fire, the crowd witnessing the impossible
the_consequence.scene_rule: outcome_scene — NOT the hero at peak action, but the world after the hero's gift was given
the_consequence.headline_example: Every hearth. Every home. Every payment.

variant_schema.brief_id: uuid — links back to the submitted brief

ui_states.loading: Skeleton thumbnails at correct aspect ratio, animated pulse. Text: 'Generating your cover variants...'
ui_states.partial_load: Show completed variants immediately. Loading state for pending variant. Do not wait for all three.
ui_states.ready: All three variants visible. Angle name + one-sentence description + Select button per variant.
ui_states.selected: Selected variant: strong border, 'Selected ✓' on button. Other two: 60% opacity.
ui_states.confirmed: 'Build Carousel →' button appears. Active only when selection made.
ui_states.variant_failed: Error card in place of failed variant: 'This one didn't work. [Retry ↻]'. Does not block other two.
ui_states.regenerating: All three return to skeleton state. Previous selection cleared. Counter shown: 'Regeneration 2 of 3.'
